Description: Repair of damage to lipping
Notes: Hardwood re-lip — min density 640kg/m3

Description: Over recessed hardware / voids from removed hardware
Notes: Hardwood timber insert per void/hole

Description: Door frame joints separated leaving gaps
Notes: Fire-stop frame-to-wall gap — intumescent mastic / ablative batt

Description: Door leaf too small for frame — oversize gaps
Notes: Seals if gap issue; re-hang if alignment issue

Description: Door closer failure / incorrect setup
Notes: Replace overhead door closer — CE-marked BS EN 1154

Description: Door leaf twisted bowed or cupped preventing closing
Notes: Adjust / re-hang door leaf

Description: Door leaf swelling due to moisture absorption
Notes: Adjust / re-hang door leaf — address moisture cause first

Description: Worn hinges causing leaf to drop — incorrect gaps
Notes: Replace / fix hinge set — BS EN 1935 Grade 11

Description: Incorrect gaps due to poor installation or frame movement
Notes: Adjust / re-hang door leaf

Description: Reserved / not in published list
Perimeter intumescent and/or smoke seals damaged or missing
Notes: B01 if smoke seals required; B02 if intumescent only

Description: Latch bolt / keep misaligned — leaf not latching or closing
Notes: Replace lever handles / latch set — CE-marked ironmongery

Description: Door leaf dropped due to loose hinge fixing
Notes: Replace / fix hinge set — check screws vs full hinge replacement

Description: Damaged glazing / glazing beads or poorly fitted glazing
Notes: Gap in rate card — flag to Alex. May need new B13 line item

Description: Split lipping at hinge screw positions
Notes: Same repair as ART01 — hardwood re-lip

Description: Architrave needs refitting / fire stopping improvement required
Notes: Fire-stop frame-to-wall gap

Description: Door leaf damaged beyond repair — leaf replacement required
Notes: Select correct A-series code based on fire rating and leaf size

Description: Full doorset replacement required — non-fire-rated door fitted
Notes: Select correct A-series code based on fire rating and leaf config

Description: Fire door signage missing or incorrect
Notes: Add / replace fire door signage — 2 signs per leaf

Description: Door frame replacement required — damage beyond repair
Notes: Full doorset replacement — select A-series code

Description: Door frame repair due to damage
Notes: Fire-stop / refit architrave

Description: Smoke seals damaged or additional smoke sealing required
Notes: Supply & fit intumescent + smoke seals

Description: Damage present with no applicable Accepted Repair Technique
Notes: Claude to flag door for manual review — likely replacement

Description: Reserved / not in published list
